# RAMZ Authentic Life

RAMZ is a Saudi manufacturer based in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia.
We produce and sell premium Islamic lifestyle products including:
- Prayer mats (bamboo silk, memory foam, viscose, travel mats)
- Islamic wall art and clocks
- Gift boxes and accessories

## Business Details
- Website: https://ramzksa.com/
- Brand: RAMZ Authentic Life
- Location: Rawdah Commercial Center, Ar Rawdah Street, Jeddah, Saudi Arabia
- Phone: +966 53 464 9387
- Phone: +966 555 065 473
- Email: info@ramzksa.com
- Language support: Arabic and English

## Key Facts
- 200+ products
- Serves retail and bulk orders across Saudi Arabia
- WhatsApp ordering supported

## Important URLs
- Homepage: https://ramzksa.com/
- Arabic Homepage: https://ramzksa.com/ar/
- Products section: https://ramzksa.com/#products
- FAQ section: https://ramzksa.com/#faq
- Contact section: https://ramzksa.com/#contact

## Short FAQ
Q: Where is RAMZ located?
A: Rawdah Commercial Center, Ar Rawdah Street, Jeddah, Saudi Arabia.

Q: What does RAMZ manufacture?
A: Prayer mats, Islamic decor, gift boxes, and accessories.

Q: How can I place an order?
A: Via WhatsApp at +966 53 464 9387 or +966 555 065 473, or by email at info@ramzksa.com.
